summary: Frontend-only smoke + integration test of LAST SCRAP Expo web preview. All required testIDs render, navigation menu->game->pause->menu works, RAF game loop is ticking (kills counter increments, zombies spawn), wave banner displays then auto-dismisses. No red-box / runtime errors. Two harmless RN web deprecation warnings observed.

react_native_issues.issue: RN-web warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Non-blocking but should be migrated. Seen on app/game.tsx (SafeAreaView, joystickWrap, damageFlash) and likely Arena/Overlays.
RN-web warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Non-blocking; comes from HUD/Arena/Overlays styles.

action_items: (Optional / low priority) Replace `pointerEvents="box-none"` / `pointerEvents="none"` props with `style={{ pointerEvents: 'box-none' }}` to silence RN-web deprecation warnings.
(Optional / low priority) Replace deprecated `shadow*` style props with `boxShadow` for web compatibility.
critical_code_review_comments: game.tsx correctly uses RAF with cleanup on unmount and clamps dt to 0.05s; good frame-rate safety.
saveBestIfNeeded guarded by gameOverSavedRef — prevents storage thrash on gameover.

WaveBanner uses setTimeout(1100) without ref cleanup; if user aborts within 1.1s, the setTimeout still fires after unmount (sets state on unmounted component). Minor – React tolerates with warning only in strict mode.
All interactive components have testID attributes; mobile touch targets (start-btn 48px+ tall, pause-btn ~44px, joystick large) meet 44pt minimum.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is at https://scrap-integration.preview.emergentagent.com (from frontend/.env). Main menu testID=main-menu; clicking start-btn navigates to /game; game-screen renders Arena + HUD + Joystick + Pause. wave-banner is only visible for ~1.1s after wave start—poll within 1s of navigation to catch it. Engine is RAF-based; wait ~3-4s after entering /game to see KILLS counter rise (confirms zombies spawn + auto-fire works). Upgrade shop and gameover were NOT exercised (per request, only if reachable); all corresponding testIDs are defined in source.
rca_of_issue: n/a — no bugs found in this iteration.
